compiled_state.title: [record-test-status.sh]: merge-to-main portability tests fail in parallel-exec context -> CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT resolution failure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Tests tests/hooks/test-merge-to-main-portability.sh, tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-auto-resolve.sh, tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-cleanliness.sh all pass standalone (bash test-file.sh) and in test-batched.sh full suite, but fail when invoked by record-test-status.sh.

Failure: line 54 of merge-to-main.sh: plugins/dso/scripts/ensure-pre-commit.sh: No such file or directory
Root cause: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT resolves to a relative path (plugins/dso) in the parallel test execution context used by record-test-status.sh -> run-script-tests.sh (MAX_PARALLEL=8).

Workaround: Pre-existing, does not block commit. Tests pass in test-batched.sh full suite.
